title: Batch Stock Processing
description:
This example demonstrates batch processing patterns inspired by financial data
pipelines. Process hundreds of stocks efficiently with:

- Batch processing with configurable sizes
- Throttling to respect API rate limits
- Resilient error handling (partial failures don't stop the batch)
- Progress tracking and reporting

**Use Cases:**
- Daily stock price updates
- Portfolio rebalancing workflows
- Market data synchronization
- Financial indicator calculations
